'''Jjannex II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Jjannex system/Legends|Jjannex system]]. The [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Stormclaw]]'' defeated a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] attack near Jjannex II.
